title: 27 undocumented environment variables
description: Environment variables used in code but not in contract: REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL, DATABASE_URI, DATABASE_NAME, APP_NAME, DATABASE_URL, DB_POOL_SIZE, JWT_SECRET, TOKEN_EXPIRY, REDIS_URL, CACHE_DURATION, GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_SECRET, DROPBOX_CLIENT_ID, DROPBOX_CLIENT_SECRET, SLACK_CLIENT_ID, SLACK_CLIENT_SECRET, MAX_COLLABORATORS, VERSION_HISTORY_DAYS, MAX_DOCUMENT_SIZE, OFFLINE_SUPPORT, ANALYTICS_RETENTION_MONTHS, REPORT_INTERVAL, GDPR_COMPLIANCE, SOC2_COMPLIANCE, LOG_LEVEL, LOG_FILE, ALLOWED_ORIGINS
probable_cause: Code references environment variables not listed in the contract file
remediation: Add missing variables to the environment contract file
